name: eesier
description: You ship product. Eesier ships customers. An autonomous AI SDR for Claude Code — finds B2B prospects matching your ICP, writes personalized cold emails, follows up, and handles replies. 24/7, on autopilot.

plugins.name: eesier
plugins.description: Hire an AI Sales Development Rep inside Claude Code. Describe your business once → it finds matching B2B leads, writes personalized cold emails, follows up, and routes replies. Multi-campaign, multi-market, multilingual.
